Payment Models for Grants

Print Email

The Robert Wood Johnson Foundation applies a standard model for grant payments that is based on the type, duration and size of the award.  Payments generally will follow the model which can be found here. Recently, the Foundation updated its payment model. For grants starting April 1 and beyond, a new payment model is available here. For all other grants with previous start dates, these items will follow the original model. The Foundation reserves the right to establish individual payment structures for grants on a case-by-case basis. For example: (1) to align payments with specific grant milestones or deliverables; (2) to provide higher up-front payment when the grant includes significant third party expenses such as re-granting; or (3) when the financial capacity of the grantee dictates a slower or more frequent payment pattern.  Please contact the Foundation program financial analyst if you have questions.
